body_excerpt: In sctp_v6_to_sk_daddr, sctp_v4_from_addr_param, and related functions of ipv6.c, protocol.c, and related files, there is a possible out of bounds read due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to remote information disclosure to an on-path attacker with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
